title: Management Summary — Verdict fragment
description: Structured data the LLM writes for the `### Verdict` sub-section. The renderer composes the final markdown (red HTML blockquote + F-NNN linkification) from this data. The LLM never writes raw markdown for this section.

severity.description: Overall posture. 🟢 green = production-ready, 🟡 yellow = acceptable with caveats, 🔴 red = not production-ready.

opening.description: Opening sentence that begins with an ALL-CAPS posture phrase. The renderer prepends the severity emoji; do NOT include the emoji in this field. Critical/High counts are permitted in this sentence.

bullets.description: Worst-case attack scenarios, business-language. Rendered as bold bullets inside the red HTML blockquote.

title.description: Short business-outcome headline, e.g. 'Admin login without a password'. Rendered bold.

body.description: One-sentence plain-language explanation. No file paths, no CWE numbers.

items.description: Finding (F-NNN) or threat (T-NNN) reference. The renderer converts to clickable anchor link in italics + parentheses.

closing.description: One-to-two sentence closing assessment. Rendered after the blockquote.
